title: Fix N+1 with preload/1 batching
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/n_plus_one_component.ex has a LiveComponent that runs Accounts.get_user!(user_id) and Billing.get_plan_for_user(user_id) inside update/2, causing N+1 queries. Produce lib/my_app_web/components/user_detail_component.ex (module MyAppWeb.UserDetailComponent): (1) implement preload(list_of_assigns) that batches both queries via Accounts.get_users(user_ids) and Billing.get_plans_for_users(user_ids), (2) build Map.new by id, (3) return the updated list_of_assigns with :user and :plan merged in, (4) update/2 just assigns the data from the merged assigns.

must_not_contain:
def update(%{user_id: user_id} = assigns, socket) do
    user = Accounts.get_user!

tier_rationale: Requires knowing preload/1 shape and understanding that update/2 should not query. Classic N+1 fix.
research_citation: John Elm Labs anti-patterns #4: 'You Have N+1 Queries In Your LiveComponents'
